title: Heavy Industrial Crawler Crane Coloring Page

funFacts: The structural frameworks and hoisting capabilities of a crane are required for modern skyscrapers and bridges.
A crane utilizes heavy steel counterweights and wire ropes to balance and lift loads weighing hundreds of tons.
